rows.label: tev057401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev057401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Milmil about the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev057401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Milmil if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Milmil about the Ma-non
in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Milmil about the
strange events on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Milmil about the
strange events on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Milmil for information
about Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Milmil about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_SEL1131
rows.name: Ask Milmil about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Way south of this caravan is Bias
citadel. Friend should stay far away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0002
rows.name:
True, friend not look very tasty, and
Bias probably not going to eat friend...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0003
rows.name:
But Bias still pump friend full of
hot ouchy lead! No one on Mira nastier
or more dangerous than Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Merchant Nopon like Milmil make
living by selling rare items.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0009
rows.name:
But lately, Bias make business
very difficult. No more safe
ways to get goods to market![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Tsumuji likes to keep up
appearances, so never lets
on how bad things really are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Mo! Milmil and crew really need
wonder savior right about now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Was friend the one who saved the
Ma-non and brought them back to NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Mwa ha ha! Milmil have merchant
contacts all over Mira. Milmil
know EVERYTHING that go on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0018
rows.name: Friend should not look so surprised![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Anyway, friend did good deed this
time—but remember that if friend ever
stray, Milmil will be first to know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0020
rows.name:
So behave! Eyes of Nopon
are watching friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Earth friends made big mistake
stealing precious Growth statue.
No wonder they so upset![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0026
rows.name:
That is why Growth unloaded
entire arsenal on city. Milmil
hear all about it from contacts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0027
rows.name:
First rule of Nopon business? Never provoke
thick- skulled alien army. Better to tell army
how smart they are and move in to make sale![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Human friends need to learn
how grown-up world works.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0035
rows.name:
Oh-ho-hoooo! Human friend is
amazing! Friend took down huge
Growth machine in White Woods, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Merchant Nopon watched the whole thing
from sidelines. Everyone was impressed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0037
rows.name:
Mature thing would have been to
recognize certain defeat and move on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0038
rows.name:
But maybe Earth friends are on to something...
Friends must be reckless enough to attempt
the impossible for miracles to happen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0043
rows.name:
This area is much more peaceful now
that friend has disposed of Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0044
rows.name:
But now super nasty Bias are
holing up in citadel to south.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0045
rows.name:
It basically the only place
Nopon still fear to go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG0046
rows.name:
Earth friend should do Milmil teensy
favor... Put nasty Bias in place and
make life easier for Nopon merchants![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1001
rows.name:
Ever since friendship treaty, Nopon
merchants across Mira have been
getting protection from BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1002
rows.name:
Seems like problem with Growth stopping
Nopon trade routes might go away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1003
rows.name:
Not only that, NLA give Nopon
lots of money! There are not
enough words to express joy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1004
rows.name:
Tsumuji is too bashful to admit
it, but deep down boss also feels
thankful to human friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1009
rows.name:
Nopon merchants have much easier time
transporting goods now that BLADE
friends help keep Growth at bay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1010
rows.name:
In fact, business never been better!
Friends providing many exciting
new commercial opportunities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1011
rows.name:
Nopon very smart for signing
friendship treaty with strong,
tough ruffians like friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057401_MSG1012
rows.name:
Tsumuji is too bashful to admit
it, but deep down boss also feels
thankful to human friends.[ST:wait ]
